features: 【Perfect for Styling】Lightweight and sleek, this volumizing hair brush is perfect for styling short to medium-length hair. The non-slip wooden handle provides comfort and precise control, making it an excellent round brush for bang and small round brush for short hair.

【Promotes Shiny Hair】Regular use of this boar bristle hair brush enhances hair health and eliminates frizz. The boar bristles smooth hair cuticles and distribute natural oils evenly, while the nylon pins detangle knots and cleanse build-up for a polished look.

【Tangle-Free Design】Ideal for short, thin hair, this round hair brush features natural boar bristles that add volume without pulling. The ergonomic non-slip wooden handle ensures easy control, and the pointed end helps with precise sectioning, making it a perfect round brush for blow out.

【Size Information】- The overall length of the hairbrush is 23.5cm/9.25 inches, and the width of the brush head part is 4.5cm/1.77 inches. It effortlessly creates a variety of hairstyles, making it an essential round hair brush for blow drying and styling.

【Smooth and Frizz-Free Hair】The gentle boar bristles prevent static and effectively remove product build-up and environmental debris. This roll brush for blow drying distributes natural oils from roots to ends, ensuring hair remains soft, smooth, and frizz-free.
